name: minigame-plugin
doc: Ops provided by the ExtensionPlugin sample (LvnMinigamePlugin.cs). Copy this file next to your scripts (or one directory up, e.g. content/ext-grammar.json) so `lvnconv validate`, the panel editor and the playground treat these ops like built-ins.

minigame.doc: Runs a host mini-game; the story pauses until it reports back. Writes `minigame_won` (bool); jumps to `on_lose` when set and lost.

vibrate.doc: Haptic pulse on devices that support it; a logged no-op elsewhere. Fire-and-forget.
